svg.title: NBL widget full event-driven flow
svg.desc: Complete load and interaction flow of the NBL loyalty widget, from page load through tab navigation

g.text: on · once · off · emit · emitSticky · clear · hasListeners · listenerCount

svg.text: user sees trigger button — nothing else has loaded yet

g.text: User clicks trigger button → event:click → emit('widget:toggle') → toggleWidget()
bus.once listener fires → emit('widget:first-open') → listener auto-removed
emit('widget:first-open') — fires exactly once, listener removed after
nav DOM updated · scroll reset · chevrons refreshed via tab:activated listener
emitSticky('tab:visited:points') etc. — marks tab as visited for re-renders
hasListeners('tab:visited:*') → re-render only if tab has been visited
widget:closed → setActiveNavigation('home') — home tab reset on every close
